verses.1: Praise the LORD! Praise Him, you servants of the LORD, Praise the name of the LORD.
verses.2: Blessed be the name of the LORD From this time on and forever.
verses.3: From the rising of the sun to its setting, The name of the LORD is to be praised.
verses.4: The LORD is high above all nations; His glory is above the heavens.
verses.5: Who is like the LORD our God, Who is enthroned on high,
verses.6: Who looks far down to The heavens and the earth?
verses.7: He raises the poor from the dust, He lifts the needy from the garbage heap,
verses.8: To seat them with noblemen, With the noblemen of His people.
verses.9: He has the infertile woman live in the house As a joyful mother of children. Praise the LORD!
